headline: CIBC Maintains Outperformer on Williams Companies, Raises Price Target to $85
summary: CIBC  analyst Robert Catellier   maintains Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) with a Outperformer and raises the price target from $83 to $85.

headline: Why Natural Gas Stocks Still Yield More Than Most Dividend ETFs
summary: Most income investors default to broad dividend exchange-traded funds (ETFs) for steady payout exposure. The Schwab US Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA: SCHD) ended 2025 with $71.6 billion in net assets and a 0.06% expense ratio, but its yield, like that of many of its peers, is in the low-single-digit range.
